title: Mesh Primitive Nodes (Cube, Cone, Cylinder, Grid, IcoSphere, UVSphere, Line)
description: Implement the 7 mesh primitive generator nodes. Each node takes numeric parameters (size, radius, segments, rings, etc.) and outputs a HalfEdgeMesh. These are the building blocks of the entire procedural modeling system. The existing Icosphere class should be refactored into MeshIcoSphere node. All primitives must produce clean, manifold half-edge meshes with correct normals. Each node is annotated with @MeshNodeAnnotation for registry discovery.
definition-of-done: 1. Seven node classes exist in ixdar-app/src/main/java/ixdar/geometry/mesh/nodes/primitives/. 2. Each is annotated with @MeshNodeAnnotation and implements MeshNode. 3. Each outputs a valid HalfEdgeMesh via evaluate(). 4. MeshCube: width/height/depth params. MeshCone: radius/depth/segments. MeshCylinder: radius/depth/segments. MeshGrid: sizeX/sizeY/subdivisionsX/subdivisionsY. MeshIcoSphere: radius/subdivisions. MeshUVSphere: radius/segments/rings. MeshLine: start/end/count. 5. All meshes pass Euler characteristic validation (V-E+F=2 for closed meshes). 6. All meshes have correct outward-facing normals.
testing-plan: 1. For each primitive: instantiate with default params, evaluate, verify vertex/face counts match expected. 2. For each primitive: create a node graph JSON with just that node, run 'ixdar_cli.py mesh-load-graph --file <graph>', then 'mesh-validate' to check geometry health, then 'screenshot' to visually verify. 3. Verify normals point outward (dot product with centroid direction > 0 for closed meshes). 4. Verify MeshIcoSphere matches the old Icosphere output. 5. Test edge cases: 3-segment cone, 1-subdivision grid, 0-subdivision icosphere. 6. Run 'mesh-state' for each primitive, verify vertex/face counts match expected values.
todos: DONE: Implement MeshCube node: 8 vertices, 12 triangles
DONE: Implement MeshCone node: fan cap + side triangles
DONE: Implement MeshCylinder node: two circle caps + quad strip sides
DONE: Implement MeshGrid node: subdivided plane
DONE: Refactor existing Icosphere into MeshIcoSphere node with subdivision parameter
DONE: Implement MeshUVSphere node: latitude/longitude grid with polar caps
DONE: Implement QuadSphereMeshNode node: 6 faces of a cube wrapped around a sphere
Implement MeshLine node: chain of edges between two points
unknowns: Whether MeshLine should output a degenerate mesh (line of zero-area faces) or a separate geometry type
